title: Day 41 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - わたしは　ははを　ぎんざへ　つれて　いって　あげました。= I took my mother to Ginza.

Sentence 2 - わたしは　ははの　にもつを　ぜんぶ　もって　あげました。= I carried all of my mother's bags for her.

Sentence 3 - わたしは　リンさんの　おかあさんに　おいしい　みせを　おしえて　あげたいです。= I would like to show your mother (Lin-san's mother) a good restaurant.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
